bullets: Pray for Christians in Azerbaijan whose sacred heritage is being destroyed, that demolished churches will not erase faith communities and that cultural and religious rights will be preserved.
Lift up the wounded and traumatized worshippers in Indonesia's Papua region, asking God for full recovery and that authorities will bring those responsible for the churchyard bombing to justice.
Ask God to protect vulnerable Christian girls in Pakistan from abduction and forced conversion, and that families separated by such injustice will be reunited and receive legal protection.
Pray for the thousands of protesters in Bolivia facing economic hardship, that food, fuel, and medicine reach those cut off, and that leaders pursue peaceful, just solutions.
Pray for the grieving Muslim community in the United States, for the families of the three worshippers killed in a hate-motivated attack at a mosque, and for an end to religiously motivated violence.
Pray for women and girls in Pakistan, that justice served in one tragic case of gender-based violence would bring greater safety and dignity to all who remain vulnerable.
Lift up the families of four people killed and hundreds arrested during transport strikes in Kenya, and ask God for peaceful resolution of the economic pressures driving the unrest.
Pray for the families of tens of thousands killed in the Philippines during past drug enforcement campaigns, and for justice and healing to come through accountability processes now underway.
Ask God to bring fair resolution for nearly 48,000 workers and their families in South Korea whose livelihoods depend on the outcome of an ongoing labor dispute at a major employer.
Lift up civilians in southern Lebanon caught in ongoing airstrikes and cross-border exchanges of fire, and ask God for protection and a swift end to the violence.
Pray for civilians across Ukraine, where the war is now in its fifth year and growing deadlier, including the nearly 800 children confirmed killed, and ask God to open a path toward lasting peace.
Lift up Kurdish communities across the region facing heightened danger amid disputed accusations, and ask God for truth, restraint, and protection for vulnerable civilian populations.
Pray for ordinary Cubans already enduring food shortages and power outages, asking God for calm, provision, and the well-being of families living in daily hardship.
Ask God to protect Palestinian civilians in the occupied West Bank facing the threat of forced displacement, and for their rights and dignity to be upheld under international law.
Pray for the people and wildlife of the island affected by a major oil spill in Iran following an attack on an oil refinery, and for urgent action to limit lasting environmental damage.
Lift up Egyptian families struggling with rising prices and economic instability, and ask God to give regional leaders wisdom as they navigate a shifting and dangerous geopolitical landscape.
Pray for communities in Vanuatu affected by a moderate earthquake near the capital, that damage would be minimal and residents would find safety and peace.
Pray for people across Indonesia's island communities shaken by a recent earthquake offshore, asking God for protection and calm amid ongoing seismic activity.
Pray for communities in Papua New Guinea who felt a recent earthquake, that no hidden damage or injuries would emerge as people assess their surroundings.
Ask God to grant peace and reassurance to people throughout Japan who felt shaking from a recent earthquake, and that no harm would come to vulnerable residents.
